JO's Courses

Group of Quantum and Scientific Computing

Courses and more

This is course is designed for Acatlan Faculty of Higher Studies students, however this website could be used for more people, but some information complimentary it will not available, since I usually implement more documentation in SEA UNAM, code, tech.io, repl.it ad more; and tests, quizes and more should be found kahoot and others.

Next you find information about courses, activities and important messages for FES-Acatlan community.
